text: Standing in this brightly lit, geometrically arranged corridor, and stepping into the immersive, vividly colored R+D space, I feel a distinct sense of curiosity mixed with a tinge of unease. The technological displays, the abstract graphics, and the quiet hum of the setting invite reflection on innovation and observation. Am I a participant or merely observed? The shifting colors and screens feel alive, watching me back, sparking thoughts on the nature of perception and consciousness in such a calculated, experimental environment.
